knownGoodMods.notes: Expected to work — verify no double-hook on pal-AI.

knownConflicts.reason: Any other mod that injects an LLM bridge competes for the same outbox / HUD hooks.
Mods that bind the same HUD widgets PalLLM targets can conflict.
knownConflicts.mitigation: Set PalLLM:Bridge:NativeHudTargets[] to a non-overlapping target, or uninstall the competitor.

knownConflicts.reason: Corporate AV / EDR that flags UE4SS DLL injection blocks the mod.
knownConflicts.mitigation: Whitelist the PalLLM install directory or talk to IT.

knownConflicts.reason: Exploit Guard "block DLL injection" rule blocks UE4SS mod loading.
knownConflicts.mitigation: Exclude the Palworld + PalLLM paths (see docs/SERVER_OPERATOR.md).

knownConflicts.reason: AppLocker / WDAC in enforce mode blocks unsigned EXE.
knownConflicts.mitigation: Wait for a code-signed release, or allowlist the PalLLM publisher.

inferenceEndpoints.notes: Pass 337 default; pairs with operator's curated D:\Models library. See docs/LOCAL_MODELS_INVENTORY.md.
Required for NVFP4 / FP8 / AWQ-INT4 inference. See docs/QUANTIZATION.md.
Lowest-latency Blackwell path. NVFP4 native. See docs/QUANTIZATION.md.
Strong agent/tool-use support. NVFP4 + FP8 native on Blackwell/Hopper.
Sends chat traffic off-device; /api/airgap/verify will mark public-internet.

quantizationFormats.notes: NVIDIA proprietary 4-bit FP. Two-level scaling (per-block FP8 micro-scale + per-tensor FP32 macro-scale). Best speed/quality on Blackwell.
OCP Microscaling 4-bit FP. Single-level per-block FP8 scale. Cross-vendor (NVIDIA + AMD).
Native 8-bit FP. Near-FP16 quality at half the memory.
llama.cpp K-quant. Mature calibration; works on every CPU/GPU.
llama.cpp 8-bit. Within 0.3 points of FP16 on most benchmarks.
Activation-aware integer quantization. Good for pre-Hopper GPUs.
